meta.name: Signage Safe Price Tool
meta.description: Industrial-grade calculation tool for determining safe pricing of signage projects based on material, labor, overhead, risk, and quality standards.

inputs.label: Material Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Direct cost of raw materials per signage unit, including substrate, ink, and laminates.

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct cost of raw materials per signage unit, including substrate, ink, and laminates.

inputs.label: Labor Hours per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Standard direct labor hours required to produce one signage unit, based on time studies.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard direct labor hours required to produce one signage unit, based on time studies.

inputs.label: Labor Rate per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Fully burdened hourly wage including benefits, taxes, and overhead allocation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fully burdened hourly wage including benefits, taxes, and overhead allocation.

inputs.label: Overhead Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage applied to direct costs to cover facility, equipment, and administrative overhead.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage applied to direct costs to cover facility, equipment, and administrative overhead.

inputs.label: Complexity Factor
inputs.businessContext: Adjusts labor and waste factors based on design complexity per ISO 9001 process variation guidelines.

businessContext_i18n.en: Adjusts labor and waste factors based on design complexity per ISO 9001 process variation guidelines.

inputs.label: Quality Level
inputs.businessContext: Defines inspection rigor and rework allowance based on Six Sigma quality levels.

businessContext_i18n.en: Defines inspection rigor and rework allowance based on Six Sigma quality levels.

inputs.label: Order Quantity
inputs.businessContext: Total number of signage units in the order, affecting volume discounts and setup amortization.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of signage units in the order, affecting volume discounts and setup amortization.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Expected material waste percentage due to setup, trimming, and defects, aligned with Lean manufacturing targets.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected material waste percentage due to setup, trimming, and defects, aligned with Lean manufacturing targets.

inputs.label: Risk Margin
inputs.businessContext: Additional margin to cover market volatility, material price fluctuations, and unforeseen delays.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional margin to cover market volatility, material price fluctuations, and unforeseen delays.

inputs.label: Shipping Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Average freight cost per unit based on distance, weight, and packaging.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average freight cost per unit based on distance, weight, and packaging.

rules.message: For high complexity, labor hours should be at least 3 hours per unit. Consider updating labor estimate.
Premium quality level expects waste factor ≤ 3%. Reduce waste to meet Six Sigma standards.
Large orders (≥500 units) typically allow risk margin ≤ 8%. Consider reducing risk margin.

thresholds.message: Total cost per unit exceeds $200. Review material and labor inputs for potential savings.
Safe price is less than 15% above cost. Profit margin may be insufficient.
Waste factor exceeds 10%. Investigate process inefficiencies per Lean principles.

formulas.label: Direct Material Cost per Unit
formulas.description: Material cost adjusted for waste and complexity.

formulas.label: Direct Labor Cost per Unit
formulas.description: Labor cost adjusted for complexity and quality level.

formulas.label: Overhead Cost per Unit
formulas.description: Overhead applied to direct material and labor costs.

formulas.label: Total Cost per Unit
formulas.description: Sum of all direct and indirect costs before margin.

formulas.label: Volume Discount Factor
formulas.description: Economies of scale factor based on order quantity.

formulas.label: Safe Price before Risk Margin
formulas.description: Price covering all costs with volume discount applied.

formulas.label: Safe Price per Unit (Primary Result)
formulas.description: Final recommended price including risk margin and profit buffer.

primary.label: Safe Price per Unit
primary.description: Recommended minimum price per signage unit to ensure profitability and risk coverage.

direct_material_cost.label: Direct Material Cost
direct_material_cost.description: Material cost including waste and complexity adjustment.

direct_labor_cost.label: Direct Labor Cost
direct_labor_cost.description: Labor cost adjusted for complexity and quality level.

overhead_cost.label: Overhead Cost
overhead_cost.description: Allocated overhead based on direct costs.

volume_discount_factor.label: Volume Discount Factor
volume_discount_factor.description: Multiplier applied for order quantity discounts.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Excessive Waste
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Waste factor above 5% indicates process inefficiency. Potential savings through Lean kaizen events.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Quality Rework Cost
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Premium quality level adds 15% labor overhead. Consider if customer truly requires Six Sigma level.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Complexity Premium
hiddenLossDrivers.description: High complexity adds up to 20% to labor and 15% to material. Evaluate design simplification.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Underutilized Volume Discount
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Order quantity below 100 units misses volume discount. Consider bundling orders.

suggestedActions.label: Implement Waste Reduction Program
suggestedActions.description: Conduct value stream mapping to identify and eliminate waste sources. Target waste factor below 3%.

suggestedActions.label: Negotiate Bulk Material Pricing
suggestedActions.description: Leverage order volume to negotiate lower material costs with suppliers. Target 5-10% reduction.

suggestedActions.label: Standardize Signage Design
suggestedActions.description: Reduce complexity by using standard shapes and fewer colors. Move from high to medium complexity.

suggestedActions.label: Match Quality Level to Customer Needs
suggestedActions.description: Use standard quality (AQL 1.0) unless premium is contractually required. Avoid over-specification.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Adjusted Price
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Safe price adjusted by a confidence factor based on input variability and historical accuracy.
